w:r.w:t: Please send us your order acceptance immediately and in case of non- receipt of order
confirmation within 3 working days, we presume that all terms & conditions mentioned in our
purchase order is acceptable to you. Please send us material dispatch details on
. Please mention our purchase order number & date while placing tax
take precedence over Terms & Conditions mentioned here.
Warranty period shall be minimum 12 months from the date of receipt at the Purchaser's Works/Plant.
receipt of the same at the Supplier's Works.
shall also fulfill the requirement of commercial settlement as per instructions of the Purchaser.
# Bill of Lading / Airway Bill, after dispatch. (In case of import)
